knockoutMilestone.description: Bonus from openfootball knockout fixtures — awarded when a real team name is slotted into each round, or when they win through to the next.

rulesText.summary: Each lab member owns 3 teams. Points come from match results (3/1/0) plus a single knockout progression bonus per team.
rulesText.matchPoints: Win = 3 pts, Draw = 1 pt, Loss = 0 pts. Applies to all matches including knockouts.
rulesText.penalties: If a knockout match is decided on penalties, it counts as a draw (1 pt each) for match scoring. The team that advances receives the higher knockout milestone bonus.
rulesText.milestone: Knockout bonus uses openfootball fixture data only (no computed group tables). +1 when a real team name appears in a Round of 32 match; later bonuses when slotted into or winning through each round.
rulesText.playerTotal: Your score is the sum of all points from your three teams.
